name: cowork-logistics-platform
description: Unified logistics platform — TMS + WMS + YMS with shared PostgreSQL backend

scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,tms,wms,yms -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:tms" "npm run dev:wms" "npm run dev:yms"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:gateway && npm run build:tms
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build:shared && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
